steps.name: assert exactly one project page root is mounted
assert project page root carries a project id
assert project page root matches the route project id
steps.assert: const match = window.location.pathname.match(/^\/projects\/([0-9a-f-]+)\//); const root = document.querySelector('[data-cocalc-project-page]'); const value = root?.getAttribute('data-cocalc-project-page') ?? ''; return match != null && value === match[1];

steps.name: assert exactly one file tab strip is mounted
assert file tab strip matches the route project id
steps.assert: const match = window.location.pathname.match(/^\/projects\/([0-9a-f-]+)\//); const strip = document.querySelector('[data-cocalc-file-tab-strip]'); const value = strip?.getAttribute('data-cocalc-file-tab-strip') ?? ''; return match != null && value === match[1];

steps.name: assert file tab strip is inside the project page root
steps.assert: const root = document.querySelector('[data-cocalc-project-page]'); const strip = document.querySelector('[data-cocalc-file-tab-strip]'); return root != null && strip != null && root.contains(strip);

steps.name: assert project page root and file tab strip agree on project id
steps.assert: const root = document.querySelector('[data-cocalc-project-page]'); const strip = document.querySelector('[data-cocalc-file-tab-strip]'); const rootValue = root?.getAttribute('data-cocalc-project-page') ?? ''; const stripValue = strip?.getAttribute('data-cocalc-file-tab-strip') ?? ''; return rootValue !== '' && rootValue === stripValue;

steps.name: assert file tab strip contains a tablist
assert exactly one tablist lives inside the file tab strip
assert project navigation shell is visible
steps.assert: const body = document.body.innerText; return body.includes('Files') && body.includes('New');
